expected_behavior: The valid krn-review report fixture parses through @krn/contracts and includes the required Slice 2 runtime artifact references.
failure_mode: The krn review report contract can no longer validate its own canonical example.

expected_behavior: The known-bad fixture missing the interpretation caveat fails deterministically.
failure_mode: The validator accepts a review report that can be overclaimed without a caveat.

expected_behavior: The CLI writes a proposal-only review report under .krn/review and the generated report parses through @krn/contracts.
failure_mode: The krn review command no longer produces a schema-backed proposal-only runtime artifact.
